dashboard.label: Example for Barebone Template Notebook Interaction
dashboard.description: Generated search results with index counting field "i" should match the returned resulting column "predicted_index" from the pandas dataframe as defined in the logic of the barebone_template.ipynb Jupyter notebook.

search.query: | makeresults count=10 | streamstats c as i | eval s = i%3 | eval feature_{s}=0 | foreach feature_* [eval <<FIELD>>=random()/pow(2,31)] | fit AITKContainer algo=barebone_template _time feature* i into app:barebone_template | eval predicted_index=predicted_index+1 | eval test=if('predicted_index'='i',"Success","Mismatch")
